summary: Verified two UI fixes: (1) Thread page no longer shows 'new contact' form/tag picker/contact creation UI - only messages and composer remain, (2) Contact page composer starts as single line (36px) and handles multiline text. Both fixes confirmed working.

thread_page_no_new_contact_form.details: Thread page (/thread/[id]) shows messages and composer only. No 'New Contact' panel, tag picker, first/last name inputs, or 'Create Contact' button found.
thread_page_no_new_contact_form.verification_method: Playwright DOM inspection confirmed: has_new_contact_panel=false, has_tag_picker_visible=false, has_create_contact_btn_visible=false, has_first_name_input=false, has_last_name_input=false

thread_page_has_expected_elements.details: Thread page correctly displays: messages area, SMS/Email mode toggle, Relationship Intel bar, and composer with placeholder 'Type your message...'

contact_page_composer_single_line_start.details: Contact page composer starts at 36px height (single line) with numberOfLines={1}. Code uses Math.max(36, Math.min(composerInputHeight, 150)) for dynamic height.

contact_page_composer_expansion.details: Composer uses onContentSizeChange to expand when user types multiline content. Visual verification shows text wrapping correctly. Max height capped at 150px.

contact_page_composer_reset.details: Composer resets to 36-38px when text is cleared (setComposerInputHeight(36) called when content is empty)

code_review.thread_[id].tsx: Confirmed removal of: isNewContact state, newContactFirstName/LastName/Photo/Tags states, checkIfNewContact(), loadAvailableTags() for new contacts, handleNewContactPhoto(), createQuickContact(), tag picker modal for new contacts, createUserAccount state. availableTags kept only for congrats card modal.
code_review.contact_[id].tsx: Line 3399 uses height: Math.max(36, Math.min(composerInputHeight, 150)) with numberOfLines={1} and onContentSizeChange handler that resets to 36 when empty.
code_review._layout.tsx: Global CSS includes 'textarea { min-height: 0 !important; }' to prevent browser defaults from forcing larger minimum heights.

context_for_next_testing_agent: Thread page cleanup verified - no new contact form elements. Contact page composer correctly starts at 36px single line and expands with content. Both fixes from the request are working as expected.

mocked_apis.Twilio SMS: MOCKED - personal SMS uses native sms: protocol
